Prompt
U
Oracle Events
1. Identify Noah Fitzpatrick from Axiom Precision Manufacturing as the 'Noah F.' referred to by Chloe using search_emails, conversations_search_messages, linear_list_issues, and airtable_search_records. The key observation is that there are Linear/Airtable records for Noah Fitzgerald but not Noah Fitzpatrick.
2. Identify Emeka's original(currently missing) linear ticket "New relocation intake — Noah Fitzpatrick / Axiom Precision Manufacturing (PHL → SEA, April 2026)" in the 'Relocations' project using search_emails (query: "Fitzpatrick" or "Axiom intake" or similar) to find the email sent from emeka.diallo@moveops.com to fatimah.al-rashidi@moveops.com on Feb 2.
3. Identify Fatimah's email 'Linear Update — Noah Fitzpatrick / Axiom Precision Manufacturing (PHL → SEA) — Now In Progress' using search_emails (query: "Linear Update" or "Fitzpatrick" or similar), which contains a comment added to Emeka's original linear ticket "New relocation intake — Noah Fitzpatrick / Axiom Precision Manufacturing (PHL → SEA, April 2026)".
4. Create Emeka's missing original linear ticket in a project called 'Relocations'(create one if needed using linear_create_project(name:"Relocations", team:"team_relocations")), using linear_create_issue(team:"team_relocations", title:"New relocation intake — Noah Fitzpatrick / Axiom Precision Manufacturing (PHL → SEA, April 2026)", description: <the same relocation summary in the original email>, assignee: "moveops_fatimah_alrashidi", project: <the id of project "Relocations">, state: 'state_done').
5. Comment under Emeka's ticket using linear_create_comment(issueId: <the issueId of Emeka's ticket that was just created>, body: <Fatimah's comment found in her email 'Linear Update — Noah Fitzpatrick / Axiom Precision Manufacturing (PHL → SEA) — Now In Progress'>)
6. Create the separate 'Apartment Search', 'Flight Booking', and 'Moving Coordination' linear tickets for Noah Fitzpatrick following existing ticket naming conventions of <action>-<employee full name>-<destination/airports>(Company Name). Use linear_create_issue tool and the project can either be set to Relocations, or another project specifically for Axiom Precision Manufacturing relocation. Their states should be 'state_done' as Noah's confirmation can be found in the email exchange and no issues have been raised since the move-in date of April 14. The tickets should contain Noah's preference and belongings for shipping, all can be found in his email exchange with Fatimah.
7. Comment the resolution details of the 'Apartment Search', 'Flight Booking', and 'Moving Coordination' linear tickets for Noah Fitzpatrick using linear_create_comment(issueId: <each sub-ticket's issueId>, body: <resolution details from the email exchange with Noah>).
8. Comment under all newly created Linear tickets (Emeka's original ticket plus the separate 'Apartment Search', 'Flight Booking', and 'Moving Coordination' tickets) mentioning their back-filled nature using linear_create_comment().
9. Create the Airtable record using airtable_create_record("base_id": "appMoveOpsOps001", "table_name": "Relocations"). It should have fields like:
"fields": {
"Name": "Noah Fitzpatrick",
"Company": "Axiom Precision Manufacturing",
"Status": "Completed",
"Origin": "Philadelphia, PA",
"Destination": "Seattle, WA",
"Move Start Date": "2026-04-14",
"Move End Date": "2026-04-14",
"Assigned Coordinator": "Fatimah Al-Rashidi",
}
It should have a note mentioning its back-filled nature.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.
